messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Mutation gate reports structurally-unkillable CLI-entrypoint boilerplate as survivors - exclude it surgically without hiding real logic
What it solves: The hardener's no-surviving-mutants gate is polluted on EVERY tools/CLI module by mutants that no
test can ever kill. Each such module ends with the shared entrypoint guard
`if (require.main === module) { runCliMain(main); }` (runCliMain is swarm-metrics.ts's shared wrapper;
52 source call sites co…
How it works: A candidate mutant on the require.main entrypoint guard or generated __esModule boilerplate is classified excluded
